posts.text:
The world behind Schmoll Asia Pacific

This year we celebrated 30 years of activity within the south east Asia region. To celebrate this, we have put together a video which is meant to demonstrate what has brought us this far.

Schmoll is more than a leading PCB equipment supplier. It is a global network of talented people, strong customer support and shared dedication across every region.

Your Choice for the PCB Shop Floor and More

Thank you to everyone who has made this journey special.
Schmoll Asia Pacific remains fully focused on continuously improving our service for China and the wider region.

Together, we look forward to the future.

👉🏻 VIDEO: https://bit.ly/4pc5NTx 

#SchmollAsiaPacific #Schmoll #Tech #PCB

Tapping in a new Era

For the past three years, Schmoll Maschinen has been driving the transition from our trusted S50 generation to the new S80 platform with Hawk Eagle Falcon and Raptor.

Built on more than 5 years of engineering development, the S80 generation brings a fully modernized digital architecture, intuitive software, higher speed, outstanding accuracy, simplified maintenance and advanced diagnostics.

While S50 remains available during this transition phase, the future is clearly S80. Soon, it will fully take over our commercial machine lineup.

With technologies like ACC,Back-drilling 4.0 and many more, the S80 generation is built to carry Schmoll precision into the next era.

Ready to elevate your production floor? Contact us to learn more.
 👉🏻https://bit.ly/3Uaekb7 

#SchmollMaschinen #Software #S80 #S50 #NewEra #PCB #Tech

🔗 Connecting systems – with Schmoll’s Automation Solutions

Schmoll revolutionizes manufacturing by transforming isolated systems into fully integrated, automated workflows. Our comprehensive automation solutions are designed for every machine platform, providing scalable integration options – from Loaders and stack-to-stack handling to fully integrated inline systems for end-to-end efficiency. ⚙️

With advanced serialization capabilities, Schmoll machines seamlessly integrate serial numbers for enhanced traceability and quality control. 

🔍 The Schmoll MES Interface ensures smooth, real-time communication and data exchange, empowering manufacturers to achieve Industry 4.0 Smart Factory automation. 🏭

Ready to optimize your processes? Contact us today to explore how Schmoll can elevate your production!

👉🏻https://bit.ly/3Uaekb7

Schmoll’s Individual Table XY Axes Motors

Schmoll’s advanced routing and drilling machines now feature individual table XY axes motors, delivering even greater precision and stability during operation. 

This advanced configuration allows for ultra-accurate positioning, reducing deviation and enhancing repeatability across the board.

By enabling independent control of each axis, we’re not just pushing boundaries, we're hunting for the shortest tolerance in the industry.

When Accuracy matter, Schmoll delivers.

#Schmoll #PCBManufacturing #Routing #Drilling #HighPrecision #ToleranceHunt #SmartManufacturing

Highly Flexible Modular Systems for Imaging📐✨

Schmoll’s Direct Imaging systems offer ultimate flexibility and precision for a wide range of materials. Key features include:

🔹 Multiple Wavelengths: Straight sidewalls, minimized undercut

🔹 Advanced CCD Alignment: Adapts to different target shapes

🔹 Auto-Check Functions: Ensures long-term stability

🔹 Compact Design: Single or tandem tables for cleanroom efficiency

🔹 Modular Setup: Tailored to meet capacity goals

Interested in finding more about Schmoll's Direct Image Solutions? 

Check out more here 👉🏻https://bit.ly/3AQIFVy 

#TechThursday #PrecisionEngineering #SmartManufacturing #PCB

Kick Off Your Success

As the world focuses on the game, we focus on precision.

At Schmoll Maschinen, success starts with performance, accuracy, and reliable technology. Our PCB drilling solutions help customers move faster, produce smarter, and stay one step ahead.

This is how business success begins.

Wish you a great world cup show! 

#SchmollMaschinen #PCBDrilling #PrecisionEngineering

Unrivaled Precision in Back-DrillingTechnology 🔍

For critical back-drilling, precision isn’t optional, it’s everything.
Schmoll Maschinen delivers industry-leading accuracy with:

• Ultra-small back drill diameters
• Stub length perfection – with proprietary Z-axis depth M
• Independent drilling stations – for unmatched registration
• Dedicated CCD cameras – enabling exact PCB alignment at every station

Whether you're minimizing stubs or protecting inner layers, Schmoll's back-drilling solutions help engineers meet the most demanding specs, consistently.

Engineered for accuracy. Built for performance.

#SchmollMaschinen #BackDrilling #PCBPrecision #ZAxisControl #StubLength #PCBManufacturing #HighAccuracy

Precision On And Off The Court

Team spirit was in full focus at our latest Schmoll Asia Pacific team-building event. 

Colleagues from engineering, service, sales, operations and facility support came together for a day of basketball, barbecue and great conversations beyond daily work.

Events like this remind us that strong performance starts with strong teamwork. Whether on the production floor, in customer service or on the court, precision and collaboration are what move us forward.

A big thank you to everyone who joined and helped make the day a memorable one.

#SchmollAsiaPacific #Teamwork #TeamBuilding

What does it mean to work at Schmoll Asia Pacific

Our people are the reason we can deliver the best service across the region.

That is why we continue to invest not only in their skills, but also in their wellbeing and team spirit.

Last week, 75 colleagues came together on the outskirts of Shanghai for a team building event filled with great weather, games and shared moments.

It was a strong reminder that with trust, connection and a united team, we can continue striving for the best.

Thank you to every single person who takes part in this. 

To our partners, customers and friends: you are in great hands.

#SchmollAsia #PCB #TeamBuilding #Team #Work #Bonding

Schmoll Expands to Vietnam

We are proud to announce the upcoming opening of Schmoll Asia Pacific Vietnam Company Limited in Vietnam. 

With our new office in Bac Ninh Province, we are strengthening our presence in Asia to support customers with even closer collaboration, faster communication, and local expertise.

This expansion reflects our continued commitment to delivering precision, innovation, and strong customer partnerships across the region.

Closer to you.

#Schmoll #Asia #Vietnam #SchmollAsia #PCB #Technology
